requirement_activation_slices.active_owner: canonical capability negotiation and attached test runtime
requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Require capability advertisement to reflect real attached handler and model-adapter support in deterministic internal hosts.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: durable continuation and public host integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove persisted continuation support and capability negotiation across activated SDK, CLI, server, MCP, and A2A hosts.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Canonical negotiation and attached host support are active while durable and public-host capability activation remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_owner: attached task-input and approval isolation boundary
requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Prove deterministic attached clarification answers cannot authorize a separately protected domain action.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove the same task-input versus approval isolation across every activated public interaction surface.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Internal attached runtime approval isolation is active while cross-surface public security evidence remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Reject secret-bearing continuation content and explicit prohibited authentication tags in the canonical boundary.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Verify every public host and renderer refuses authentication material through the activated task-input capability.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Canonical codecs and tagged-field security checks are active while public host capability paths remain dormant.

requirement_activation_slices.active_owner: in-memory broker and attached execution runtime
requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Own identity, branch correlation, validation, idempotency, cancellation, and attached delivery through the branch-scoped in-memory broker.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: durable broker and public host integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Add detached persistence, public delivery, timeout and expiry policy, and privacy-aware observability in later phases.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: The in-memory broker and attached runtime are active without claiming later durable, detached, or public-host ownership.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Stop provider read-ahead, model turns, and dependent domain work while an attached required request is unresolved.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove the same zero-work suspension invariant while a continuation is persisted and resumed after detachment.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached zero-read-ahead suspension is active while detached continuation suspension remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Keep attached required input pending until one explicit terminal resolution is committed and correlated.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Preserve unresolved state and terminal resolution semantics across persisted detached waiting and later resume.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached unresolved-state enforcement is active while durable detached waiting remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Return explicit declined, cancelled, timed-out, and unavailable outcomes to the attached pending model call.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: public headless and interactive host integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove presentation and resume failures produce explicit model-visible outcomes across activated public hosts.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Internal attached non-answer projection is active while public-host failure projection remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Apply a broker-controlled advisory waiting budget in the deterministic attached runtime.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: SDK and public host policy integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Apply declared advisory waiting budgets through activated embedded and public host control channels.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Deterministic attached advisory budgeting is active while public host policy integration remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Preserve advisory budget expiry as timed-out policy provenance in the attached runtime.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: SDK and public host provenance integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Preserve timed-out provenance through activated embedded and public host renderers and transports.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached timeout provenance is active while cross-surface host provenance remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Record a post-timeout or trusted attached default with default provenance rather than human provenance.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_owner: SDK and public host default integrations
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Preserve default provenance through activated embedded and public host renderers and transports.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached default provenance is active while cross-surface host default handling remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Preserve genuine originating execution and branch identity across concurrent attached invocations.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Preserve origin identity across delegated child agents, nested flows, and activated orchestration surfaces.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Single-agent attached branch identity is active while nested multi-agent propagation remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Route attached requests only to their origin branch while unrelated runs continue independently.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Add safe origin presentation, serialization, queueing, and parent-child cancellation across nested agents.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached branch-local routing is active while nested orchestration routing and queueing remain planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Enforce at most one unresolved required request in one attached execution branch.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Enforce unresolved-request cardinality across delegated branches and nested agent orchestration.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Attached per-branch cardinality is active while nested orchestration enforcement remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Reject yes, continue, and do it clarification answers as authorization for a protected action.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove clarification text cannot authorize protected actions across every activated public surface.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Deterministic attached clarification isolation is active while public-surface security coverage remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Reject secret-bearing snapshots and explicit password, key, token, payment, and authentication-challenge tags.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Verify every activated CLI, SDK, HTTP, MCP, A2A, task, and nested host refuses secret collection end to end.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Canonical tagged-field and snapshot rejection is active while production host surfaces remain unadvertised.

requirement_activation_slices.active_owner: core stream and task observer boundary
requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Project opaque correlation through content-safe observer tokens and fail closed on forged content or invalid lifecycle state.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Verify complete telemetry retention, wait timing, category, duplicate, stale, cancellation, expiry, and resume behavior across every public surface.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Core observer projection and security are active; the comprehensive cross-surface telemetry contract remains planned.

requirement_activation_slices.active_owner: attached transcript and stream integrity boundary
requirement_activation_slices.active_scope: Keep attached transcript, response, and execution state valid across malformed input, sink failure, and cancellation.
requirement_activation_slices.remaining_scope: Prove presentation and transport failures cannot corrupt state across every activated public interaction surface.
requirement_activation_slices.evidence: Internal attached failure integrity is active while the public cross-surface failure matrix remains planned.

replacements.evidence: Canonical types exist while all production capability registries remain unadvertised.
